Title: News Module Blade Opens and Lists Articles
Preconditions: Admin logged in (BSM-001 passed); vc-news module installed
Steps:
[NAV] {{ADMIN_URL}}/#!/workspace/embedded-app/vc-news
[WAIT] vc-news embedded app (iframe) loads
[ACT] observe article list, sidebar filters and toolbar
Assertions:
[BLADE] 'Articles: All' region visible
[DOM] sidebar filters present: Drafts, Scheduled, Published, Archived, All
[DOM] toolbar buttons present: Refresh, Add, Delete
[GRID] list grid renders columns: Name, Store, Is published, Publish date, Is archived, Archive date
[GRID] pagination control present (e.g. '1-20 of N')
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST {{back_url}}/api/news/search (body: storeId={{store}}, take=5, skip=0) -> 200 with totalCount >= 0 and results array
[CONSOLE] no console errors (no TypeError/ReferenceError/uncaught) after app load
Failure_Signals: Embedded app iframe blank or 404, app fails to mount, grid renders Angular/Vue error, /api/news/search returns 404 (module not installed)

Title: Create Article With Required Fields and Verify in API
Preconditions: Admin logged in; News module open (NEWS-001 passed)
Steps:
[NAV] {{ADMIN_URL}}/#!/workspace/embedded-app/vc-news
[ACT] click 'Add'
[WAIT] Article create blade opens
[ACT] fill Name = {{name}}
[ACT] select Store = {{store}}
[ACT] select Publish scope = Anonymous
[ACT] click 'Save'
[WAIT] save completes ('Has unsaved changes' alert clears)
Assertions:
[ALERT] 'Has unsaved changes' indicator disappears after Save
[DOM] full article editor renders post-save (Content / Metadata / SEO sections appear)
[GRID] new article {{name}} appears in list (search by name returns 1 row, Store={{store}})
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST {{back_url}}/api/news -> 200; capture response id -> NEWS_ID
[API] GET {{back_url}}/api/news/{{NEWS_ID}} -> 200 with name={{name}}, storeId={{store}}, publishScope=Anonymous
[CONSOLE] no console errors after Save
Failure_Signals: Save returns error on valid required input, article absent from /api/news/search after save, POST /api/news non-200, editor does not expand after create

Title: Required-Field Validation Blocks Save
Preconditions: Admin logged in; News module open
Steps:
[NAV] {{ADMIN_URL}}/#!/workspace/embedded-app/vc-news
[ACT] click 'Add'
[WAIT] create blade opens
[ACT] click 'Save' with Name, Store and Publish scope all empty
Assertions:
[DOM] required-field markers (*) shown on Name, Store, Publish scope
[STATE] article is NOT persisted (no success toast / list count unchanged)
[STATE] blade remains on the create form
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] no successful POST {{back_url}}/api/news (200) is issued for the empty form
[CONSOLE] no uncaught exceptions on Save attempt
Failure_Signals: Empty form persists an article, POST /api/news fires and returns 200 for empty required fields, app crashes on invalid Save
Cleanup: If an article was unexpectedly created, DELETE it via {{back_url}}/api/news?ids=<id>
References: known gap: no explicit inline validation message observed (only * markers) — see session notes

Title: Publish Article (Title+Content → Publish button) sets isPublished → Published
Preconditions: Admin logged in; News module open. NOTE: Save persists localized content only when BOTH Title and Content (en-US) are filled — Content alone leaves Save disabled. The 'Publish' button appears only after content is saved (newsArticleCanPublish).
Steps:
[NAV] {{ADMIN_URL}}/#!/workspace/embedded-app/vc-news
[ACT] create article ({{name}}, {{store}}, Anonymous); capture id -> NEWS_ID
[ACT] expand 'Content'; fill Title (en-US) AND type body into Content (en-US) — Title is required for Save to enable
[ACT] click 'Save'
[ASSERT] GET {{back_url}}/api/news/{{NEWS_ID}} -> localizedContents[0].content is non-empty (DOM text alone is NOT proof on this build)
[ASSERT] a 'Publish' button now appears in the toolbar
[ACT] leave Publish date empty (or set a PAST date)
[ACT] click 'Publish'
[ACT] open 'Published' filter and search {{name}}
Assertions:
[TOOLBAR] 'Publish' hidden for an empty article; appears only after Title+Content are saved
[GRID] after Publish the article is under 'Published' (publishDate empty or past) and not under 'Drafts'
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET {{back_url}}/api/news/{{NEWS_ID}} -> isPublished=true; publishDate null or <= now
[API] isPublished is server-managed — cannot be set via raw PUT (HTTP 500); only the Publish action sets it
[CONSOLE] no console errors after Save/Publish
Failure_Signals: Save stays disabled or content not persisted when only Content (no Title) is filled; Publish button missing after content saved; Publish does not set isPublished=true; published article absent from 'Published'; raw PUT can set isPublished
References: NewsArticleSearchService; useNewsArticleDetails.newsArticleCanPublish; build quirk: Title required to enable Save

Title: Create Copy Clones Content and Resets Publish State
Preconditions: A content-rich source article exists
Steps:
[NAV] {{ADMIN_URL}}/#!/workspace/embedded-app/vc-news
[ACT] open a source article that has Title, Content and SEO
[ACT] click 'Create copy'
[WAIT] copy is created
[ACT] search list for '[COPY]'
Assertions:
[GRID] a new '[COPY] <source name>' article exists
[STATE] copy opens as a draft (Publish date = Not set)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET {{back_url}}/api/news/<copyId> -> name starts with '[COPY]', localizedContents content length equals source, storeId/publishScope match source, publishDate=null
[API] compare seoInfos[0].semanticUrl of copy vs source
[CONSOLE] no console errors after Create copy
[NOTE] copy duplicates the source SEO slug verbatim — publishing the copy without changing the slug risks a duplicate-URL collision (candidate defect)
Failure_Signals: Copy not created, content/SEO not carried over, copy auto-published (publishDate inherited) instead of draft
References: /api/news; session finding: duplicate SEO slug on clone

Title: Status Filters Return Correct Subsets (Draft/Scheduled/Published/Archived)
Preconditions: Articles exist in mixed states: a Draft (isPublished=false), a Published (isPublished=true + past/empty date), a Scheduled (isPublished=true + future date), an Archived (isArchived=true), and ideally one published-then-archived article
Steps:
[NAV] {{ADMIN_URL}}/#!/workspace/embedded-app/vc-news
[ACT] click each sidebar filter: Drafts, Scheduled, Published, Archived, All
Assertions:
[GRID] 'Drafts' = NOT published and not archived (isPublished=false && isArchived=false) — keyed on isPublished, independent of publish date
[GRID] 'Scheduled' = isPublished=true && publishDate>now
[GRID] 'Published' = isPublished=true && (publishDate==null || publishDate<=now) — NOTE: does NOT exclude archived; a published-then-archived article appears under BOTH 'Published' AND 'Archived' (overlap is by design)
[GRID] 'Archived' = isArchived=true (&& archiveDate null or <= now)
[GRID] 'All' shows the full set; count(All) >= each subset (Published and Archived may overlap)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no console errors when switching filters
[NOTE] bucket logic per NewsArticleSearchService.BuildStatusSearchCriteria (computed at query time)
Failure_Signals: A filter shows rows from another state; Drafts judged by publish date instead of isPublished; Scheduled drops valid future-dated published articles; filter switch throws

Title: List Select-All Across Pages (Select all N items)
Preconditions: More than one page of articles exists (>1 page, e.g. 51 items across pages)
Steps:
[NAV] {{ADMIN_URL}}/#!/workspace/embedded-app/vc-news
[WAIT] article list renders with pagination (e.g. '1-20 of 51')
[ACT] click the header (select-all) checkbox
[WAIT] page rows become selected
[ASSERT] banner appears: 'All items in this page are selected.' with a 'Select all N items' link
[ACT] click 'Select all N items'
[ACT] click 'Delete' to open the confirmation (DO NOT confirm)
[ACT] click 'Cancel' in the confirmation dialog
[ACT] click the header checkbox again to clear the selection
Assertions:
[GRID] header checkbox selects every row on the current page only
[BANNER] cross-page banner shows the correct total (matches '... of N' pagination total)
[SELECT] 'Select all N items' extends selection to all items across all pages (selection count = N)
[DIALOG] Delete confirmation reflects the full cross-page count ('delete N articles?')
[STATE] Cancel aborts with no deletion; toggling header checkbox clears the selection and hides the banner
Cross_Layer_Checks: [CONSOLE] no console errors during select-all / clear
Failure_Signals: Banner does not appear after page select-all, 'Select all N' count wrong or does not extend beyond the current page, Delete confirmation count mismatches the selection, Cancel still deletes, selection cannot be cleared
Cleanup: none — NON-DESTRUCTIVE: confirmation is cancelled, no articles are deleted (do not Confirm — would wipe all store news)
References: Suite 084 NEWS-011 (bulk delete); vc-news list grid

Title: Name and Slug Accept Special Characters and Long Values
Preconditions: News module open
Test_Data: admin_url={{ADMIN_URL}}; back_url={{BACK_URL}}; store={{STORE_ID}}; name=AGENT-TEST-News-{{TIMESTAMP}} (variant: 200+ chars and special chars - ampersand, percent, unicode, emoji)
Steps:
[NAV] {{ADMIN_URL}}/#!/workspace/embedded-app/vc-news
[ACT] create an article with a very long Name (200+ chars) containing special characters (ampersand, percent, unicode, emoji)
[ACT] SEO -> enter a slug containing spaces, uppercase and special characters
[ACT] click 'Save'
Assertions:
[FIELD] long Name is accepted or gracefully validated/truncated (no crash)
[SEO] slug is normalized (lowercased, spaces to hyphens, illegal chars stripped) or validated with a message
[GRID] the article renders in the list without breaking layout; special chars are escaped (no markup injection)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET {{back_url}}/api/news/{{NEWS_ID}} -> Name persisted consistently; seoInfos semanticUrl normalized
[CONSOLE] no console errors on save with special input
Failure_Signals: Save crashes or 500s on special chars, slug stored with spaces/illegal chars, long Name breaks grid layout, unescaped markup in the list (XSS)

Title: Published Article with Future Date → Scheduled (auto-returns to Published when date passes)
Preconditions: An article with saved Title+Content that has been Published (isPublished=true) — e.g. via NEWS-007.
Steps:
[NAV] {{ADMIN_URL}}/#!/workspace/embedded-app/vc-news
[ACT] create article with Title+Content, Save, click 'Publish' (isPublished=true); capture id -> NEWS_ID
[ACT] Publish settings -> set Publish date to a FUTURE date, then Save. NOTE: changing ONLY the date may leave Save disabled (the datepicker does not mark the form dirty on this build) — touch another field if Save stays disabled.
[ACT] open 'Scheduled' filter and search {{name}}
Assertions:
[GRID] the published article with a FUTURE publish date appears under 'Scheduled', NOT under 'Published' or 'Drafts'
[GRID] when the publish date is moved to the past (or the future date passes) the article returns to 'Published' automatically — no re-publish needed
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET {{back_url}}/api/news/{{NEWS_ID}} -> isPublished=true AND publishDate > now while Scheduled
[CONSOLE] no console errors
[NOTE] Scheduled = isPublished && publishDate>now; Published = isPublished && (publishDate==null||publishDate<=now). Computed at query time (no background job) — transition is automatic.
Failure_Signals: Published future-dated article shows as Published (date ignored) or drops to Drafts; Scheduled empty for a published future-dated article; no auto-return to Published when date passes
References: NewsArticleSearchService; build quirk: date-only change may not enable Save

Title: Future Archive Date Does Not Archive Until Date Passes
Preconditions: A published article exists
Steps:
[NAV] {{ADMIN_URL}}/#!/workspace/embedded-app/vc-news
[ACT] create and publish article ({{name}}, {{store}})
[ACT] Publish settings -> set Archive date to a FUTURE date
[ACT] click 'Save'
Assertions:
[STATE] the article remains active / not archived while the archive date is in the future
[GRID] the article is not listed under 'Archived' yet
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET {{back_url}}/api/news/{{NEWS_ID}} -> archiveDate is in the future; isArchived=false until the date passes
[CONSOLE] no console errors after save
Failure_Signals: Article is archived immediately despite a future archive date, or archive date is not persisted

Title: Unpublish Returns Article to Draft
Preconditions: A Published or Scheduled article exists (isPublished=true) — e.g. via NEWS-007.
Steps:
[NAV] {{ADMIN_URL}}/#!/workspace/embedded-app/vc-news
[ACT] open a published/scheduled article (isPublished=true); capture id -> NEWS_ID
[ASSERT] an 'Unpublish' button is present in the toolbar
[ACT] click 'Unpublish'
[ACT] open 'Drafts' filter and search {{name}}
Assertions:
[TOOLBAR] 'Unpublish' is shown only while the article is published
[GRID] after Unpublish the article appears under 'Drafts' and not under 'Published'/'Scheduled'
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET {{back_url}}/api/news/{{NEWS_ID}} -> isPublished=false after Unpublish
[CONSOLE] no console errors after Unpublish
Failure_Signals: Unpublish button missing on a published article; Unpublish does not clear isPublished; article stays in Published/Scheduled
